subcodes.first_line: O Sign of the Love of God, O Noble Companion! For a time Thou hast wandered bewildered through mountain and plain, lost amidst desert and sea [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آیت محبت الله حضرت قرین مدتی بود که سرگشته کوه و صحرا و گمگشته دشت و دریا
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @thankfulness; gratitude, @love of God
